policy.goal: Prevent important analysis from living in Notion, GitHub, Gmail, or cache files without a clear cockpit surfacing path.
policy.rule: Every state object needs one source of truth, one repo convention artifact when the engine consumes it, a freshness/not-checked rule, and a dashboard surface.
policy.engine_boundary: The engine reads repo convention files only through full_build_runner.py; Notion, Gmail, UW, and broker sources are gathered by routines before the build.

objects.producer: snaptrade_book_refresh.py preferred daily/post-trade path, or broker_position_intake -> broker_pdf_extractor fallback, then build_positions_cache
objects.dashboard_surface: Holdings, Today's Actions, TARGET DRIFT preflight
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical only after a staged SnapTrade pull or fallback broker extract validates; raw SnapTrade payloads, local profile overrides, secrets, and broker PDFs stay outside repo.
objects.freshness_contract: Only refresh after staged combined JSON validation and build_positions_cache validation pass; SnapTrade book refresh is preferred daily/post-trade path, manual PDF/text extraction is backup.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Do not overwrite positions.json; if SnapTrade or fallback extraction fails, preflight must show stale/not checked rather than all clear.
objects.action_surface: Sizing gaps, underweight high-conviction names, and sell/trim risks can become surfaced actions.

objects.producer: snaptrade_book_refresh.py preferred daily/post-trade path, backed by position_reconciliation.py
objects.dashboard_surface: Book tab account views; POSITION DIFF preflight uses the paired reconciliation artifact
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical account-level normalized state after validated promotion; raw SnapTrade payloads, local account-owner overrides, secrets, and PDFs are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh only from the same validated combined JSON used for positions.json, with owner labels inspected before promotion.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Keep prior cache and report SnapTrade/extraction/reconciliation not checked.
objects.action_surface: Account ownership and concentration context; not a trade signal by itself.

objects.producer: snaptrade_book_refresh.py preferred daily/post-trade path, backed by position_reconciliation.py
objects.dashboard_surface: Preflight POSITION DIFF
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical until next validated broker snapshot.
objects.freshness_contract: Diff current validated account_positions against prior account_positions.
objects.not_checked_behavior: If no prior cache exists or SnapTrade/fallback validation fails, write status not_checked with no false NEW actions.
objects.action_surface: Trade-like changes are surfaced as durable preflight facts for reconciliation.

objects.dashboard_surface: Holdings stance, MONITOR gates, research action gating, sizing tiers
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub is canonical; Notion may mirror thesis prose but must not override machine stance/tier silently.
objects.freshness_contract: Update when a name changes ACTIVE/MONITOR, tier, sleeve, or core thesis.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing theses is a build failure, not checked clear.
objects.action_surface: Determines whether research, catalysts, and source calls can become ACT_NOW or stay MONITOR.

objects.producer: decision_dossier_sync from Live Theses Notion rows, or explicit Codex seed/update after live readback
objects.dashboard_surface: TODAY-DECIDE card dossier block: one-liner plus edge, price, timing, and avoid reads
objects.mirror_policy: Notion can be the human-editable narrative source, but runtime cards read only the repo mirror. Repo rows must carry sync/review stamps and per-read freshness.
objects.freshness_contract: Durable edge/avoid reads must have review stamps; price and timing reads require short freshness windows and render UNKNOWN when stale or not checked.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Absent ticker means no dossier block. Present but stale/not_checked reads render UNKNOWN and must not be treated as current.
objects.action_surface: Adds context to action cards only; does not change conviction scoring, ranking, sizing, gates, or trade posture.

objects.dashboard_surface: Radar, conviction direction, possible actions/top prospects
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores redacted structured calls only; raw Fundstrat bodies are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Only full-body batch_read_email or supplied full files populate this file.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Snippet-only Gmail search must not update daily calls or inbox_call_dates.
objects.action_surface: Named BUY/SELL/trim calls can become source-call candidates, top prospects, or action context.

objects.dashboard_surface: Fundstrat Bible stance/What-to-Own context and monthly Top-5/Bottom-5 call cards
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores compact monthly deck state only; raw PDFs, raw text, stock-price chart text, and Core List tables are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from a direct monthly PDF/text/JSON upload that validates through fundstrat_bible_intake.py.
objects.not_checked_behavior: No monthly upload means do not overwrite fundstrat_bible.json; report monthly upload not checked in routine evidence.
objects.action_surface: Top-5/Bottom-5 cards can inform analyst-call context; separate Consider List rows can feed low-pressure prospects through top_prospects.json.

objects.dashboard_surface: FundStrat Data Gaps and If I Were You review priorities
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores section-level distilled/skipped/empty status only; raw FundStrat source bodies are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Update on every FundStrat deck or note ingest with source_id, title, ingested_at, total_sections, sections, and skipped_count.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing inventory for an active Bible layer warns partial source; skipped sections warn partial source.
objects.action_surface: Prevents partial FundStrat layers from being treated as fully checked evidence.

objects.feed_path: audit file; dates feed calibration chain through inbox_call_dates.json
objects.dashboard_surface: Calibration banner and routine audit, not a direct cockpit lane
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores metadata, snippets, body length, and body hash; raw bodies redacted.
objects.freshness_contract: Full-body entries set inbox dates; snippets are discovery only.
objects.not_checked_behavior: If only snippets exist, report discovery-only and leave full-body checked state false.
objects.action_surface: Supports source-call persistence checks; not a direct trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Feedback loops calibration/provisional banner
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores date metadata only; raw Fundstrat emails are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from full-body Fundstrat intake or a validated merge path.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing or stale dates keep calibration provisional; snippet-only discovery must not update this file.
objects.action_surface: Calibrates source-call loudness and freshness; not a direct trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Feedback loops calibration/provisional banner
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores classified source-call date metadata only.
objects.freshness_contract: Update when classified source-call candidates merge into source_calls.json.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing or stale dates keep calibration provisional.
objects.action_surface: Calibrates repeated source-call evidence; not a direct trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Feedback loops and calibration/provisional banner
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache mirrors classified source-call log until a Notion DB is fully repo-owned.
objects.freshness_contract: Merge after full-body Fundstrat parse and classification.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Stale or missing inbox/log dates keeps calibration PROVISIONAL.
objects.action_surface: Repeated trusted source calls can escalate attention; calibration affects loudness.

objects.dashboard_surface: Prospects lane and promoted ACT_NOW/sell-fast actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical signal-event store; Notion may hold richer dossiers.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from full-body daily source events, direct monthly Top-5/Bottom-5/separate Consider List rows, or explicit research inputs.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing/empty is lane_status not_checked or checked_clear depending routine evidence.
objects.action_surface: High-priority prospects can promote into Today's Actions.

objects.dashboard_surface: Research panel, From Research, promoted ACT_NOW research actions
objects.mirror_policy: Notion can be workflow source; GitHub convention file is the engine input.
objects.freshness_contract: Only update when queue rows were actually fetched or supplied.
objects.not_checked_behavior: No export/input means do not overwrite; report Research Queue not checked.
objects.action_surface: High/medium ticker dossiers surface; explicit ACT_NOW non-MONITOR dossiers promote.

objects.dashboard_surface: Upcoming catalysts and Today's Actions for near-term held-name catalysts
objects.mirror_policy: Calendar/Notion may be source; GitHub convention file is build input.
objects.freshness_contract: Rows must include dates and tickers; held catalysts within horizon become visible.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing fetch is not checked, not no catalysts.
objects.action_surface: Time-sensitive catalyst reviews become ACT_NOW/WATCH based on stance.

objects.dashboard_surface: Bullish flow lane and evidence context
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores summarized signal cache; raw UW JSON must not accumulate in orchestrator context.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh in bounded ticker batches and mark generated_at.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing/stale cache is not checked or stale; never quiet tape.
objects.action_surface: UW confirms timing/conviction but is not sufficient alone for capital action.

objects.dashboard_surface: UW Action Runbook endpoint-proof banner, Market-Open Packet blockers, Source Proof row
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores redacted endpoint status summaries and row counts only; raw UW payloads and API keys are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Rows must include mode, endpoint, status, checked_at, and summary; same-session proof is required for active high-volatility promotion.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing cache leaves UW endpoint proof not_checked; malformed rows fail closed and do not count as successful endpoint evidence.
objects.action_surface: Captured endpoint status can remove the 'not checked' gap, but neutral rows do not confirm a trade thesis or execute action.

objects.dashboard_surface: Session-open INSIDER ACTIVITY preflight and institutional/orphan evidence
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores normalized Form 4 rows plus _meta status only; raw UW payloads and API keys are not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh from UW insider transactions for held tickers and stamp _meta.status, checked_at, ticker_count, and transaction_count.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing token, failed UW request, or unstamped empty cache surfaces as not_checked/stub; only a stamped checked_clear zero-row run may read as no insider signal.
objects.action_surface: Open-market buys, clusters, and pre-catalyst sales can raise review priority; they do not execute trades.

objects.dashboard_surface: Parabolic risk/watch context in holdings/actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores screener cache; raw UW bundle stays outside conversation and is not committed.
objects.freshness_contract: Run screener from validated bundle and emit cache explicitly.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Empty with valid data is checked clear; empty with failed field mapping is a mismatch, not quiet tape.
objects.action_surface: Flags chase/risk control context, not standalone buy signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Synthesis panel and conservative synthesis actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub structured summary is build input; Notion may keep longer narrative.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from supplied Daily Synthesis JSON; structured actions should include ticker/action/urgency when intended to surface.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing synthesis is not checked; vague prose alone must not create trades.
objects.action_surface: Structured or ticker-led actionable items can promote conservatively.

objects.feed_path: monthly Deep Synthesis support artifact; not consumed by action generation
objects.dashboard_surface: Deep Synthesis write-up when the routine includes monthly outcome-pattern findings
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores explicit driver/category pattern findings; Notion may mirror findings in the synthesis page.
objects.freshness_contract: Run monthly or when explicitly requested against supplied Trade Outcomes and Decisions Log exports.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing exports or missing explicit driver/category tags are not_checked/insufficient_sample, not a clean learning read.
objects.action_surface: System-learning observations only; findings can inform review questions but do not create trade actions.

objects.feed_path: full_build_runner.DEFAULT_FILES.meridian -> meridian source -> conviction direction/net read context
objects.dashboard_surface: Holdings conviction and thesis context when archived Meridian data exists
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores structured Meridian thesis/call/model rows only.
objects.freshness_contract: Meridian stopped updating after March 2026; treat it as thesis archive context, not fresh tactical evidence.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing Meridian archive data should not count as a live-source miss or no-signal read.
objects.action_surface: Conflicting or confirming thesis context; never a standalone trade signal.

objects.dashboard_surface: Macro panel and macro alert actions
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is build input; live routine should refresh before publish.
objects.freshness_contract: Macro values must pass macro_pulse_scan.py --validate and publish-gate plausibility before publish.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Stale/missing macro must show as stale/not checked and can fail publish.
objects.action_surface: Macro alerts can affect risk, sizing, and leverage posture.

objects.dashboard_surface: Rotation, fresh signals, decision aging move-since
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores normalized close arrays; raw API responses stay in supplied routine inputs or worker files.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh before full build when market data is needed; intake must validate all default rotation tickers have enough history before writing.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Stale prices can make fresh signals empty; show stale, not quiet.
objects.action_surface: Supports rotation and fresh-signal action detection.

objects.dashboard_surface: Today's Actions durable decision-aging rows
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub cache is canonical memory of unresolved opportunities after publish.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only after a publish-safe feed.
objects.not_checked_behavior: No store means no aging, not resolved.
objects.action_surface: Prevents urgent opportunities from disappearing after one mention.

objects.dashboard_surface: Heartbeat strip and lane status
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub status cache is build input; routine logs may live elsewhere.
objects.freshness_contract: heartbeat_status.py reports required input, market-data, publish-gate, optional-lane, and build status plainly.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Absent heartbeat rows are not checked.
objects.action_surface: Operational surface only; can block confidence in other action lanes.

objects.dashboard_surface: Signal Log lane
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores structured watch-only signal rows.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from supplied Signal Log or Morning Scan JSON.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing fetch is not checked, not no signals.
objects.action_surface: Watch-only context; never directly promotes into actions.

objects.dashboard_surface: Social Watch lane under Action view and summary export
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores minimal normalized snippets, tickers/entities, timestamps, subreddits, derived scores, and expiry metadata; raw social content should not accumulate.
objects.freshness_contract: Use compliant API/OAuth intake, rate-limit tracking, and short retention; deleted or expired social content must not persist as current evidence.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing social cache is not checked, not no social anomalies.
objects.action_surface: Watch-only early-signal context; can route to Research Queue or Re-check only after independent non-social confirmation.

objects.dashboard_surface: Event Risk lane status plus promoted Today's Actions review prompts
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores compact structured event-risk rows only; raw news bodies and long source narratives stay outside repo.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only from supplied daily/weekly event scan rows when fast market-moving events are present or explicitly checked clear.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing event-risk scan is not checked, not no event risk.
objects.action_surface: High and critical event risks promote to exposure-review actions only; they do not create buy/sell orders.

objects.producer: trigger_check.py registration helpers plus routine-specific trigger registration
objects.dashboard_surface: Source proof and audits trigger-registry row
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores non-secret trigger conditions and fired/expired state; routines may update only through trigger_check.py and the cloud commit allowlist.
objects.freshness_contract: Fundstrat Daytime Watch, Post-Open Evidence Gate, and Post-Close Refresh run trigger_check.py; fired rows are one-shot and append a receipt.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing trigger-check summary or missing quote data stays not_checked; never infer no triggers fired.
objects.action_surface: Creates review prompts and push alerts only; it does not execute trades.

objects.dashboard_surface: Planning queue, not live trading dashboard
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub is canonical; Notion can mirror project management state.
objects.freshness_contract: Validate after every queue change.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing queue does not affect feed; it affects project planning only.
objects.action_surface: Keeps product/system improvements separate from live market actions.

objects.producer: Task-0 integration of recovery V3 files
objects.dashboard_surface: Goal anchor, pace math, and card plan-line framing in TODAY—DECIDE
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores canonical tuned thresholds and goal params for the decision layer.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only when the decision layer mandate changes; preserve existing field contracts.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Do not infer defaults when malformed or missing; log the missing-keys contract explicitly.
objects.action_surface: Gates rank and plan-line math inputs; does not issue live actions.

objects.producer: Task-0 integration of recovery V3 files
objects.dashboard_surface: Weight set used by directive ranking and conviction scoring
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores canonical evidence weights and thresholds used by runtime scoring.
objects.freshness_contract: Update only through deliberate decision-layer edits and with changelog intent.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing weights must fail the load path; no silent fallback.
objects.action_surface: Adjusts card scoring and urgency behavior before execution decisions.

objects.producer: Task-0 integration of recovery V3 files plus 2026-06-12 SnapTrade account semantics handoff
objects.dashboard_surface: Execution_plan account exclusion and PCRA guardrails
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores canonical account placement constraints and non-secret account tax/flag semantics for plan emitters; local SnapTrade profiles remain secrets/connector config only.
objects.freshness_contract: Update when account exclusion policy, account ids, tax_status, or executable flags such as etf_only/crypto_account intentionally change.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Fail closed when malformed; do not emit execution rows without loaded rules.
objects.action_surface: Converts action execution legs to excluded/allowed states.

objects.producer: Task-0 integration of recovery V3 files
objects.dashboard_surface: CONGRUENCE strip and standing insight matching
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores source-of-truth active/inactive insight rows for scoring and matching.
objects.freshness_contract: Populate from validated insight capture before build; keep seeded baseline rows if no new ingest.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing or invalid insight payload is a hard failure for scoring modules.
objects.action_surface: Confidence and congruence outputs are advisory unless matched to live lane evidence.

objects.producer: Task-0 integration of recovery V3 files
objects.dashboard_surface: TODAY—DECIDE gate banner
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores canonical timed market-gating envelopes used by timing_engine.
objects.freshness_contract: Refresh only through explicit timing rule updates and validation.
objects.not_checked_behavior: If unavailable, timing eval runs in conservative fallback mode and must surface not checked.
objects.action_surface: Alters card validity state and suggested trading cadence.

objects.producer: Task-0 integration of recovery V3 files
objects.dashboard_surface: Tunables auditability and policy change traceability
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores append-only change records for tunables decisions.
objects.freshness_contract: Append JSON lines for each intentional tunable adjustment.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Absent changelog is explicit but does not block scoring if live payload is present.
objects.action_surface: Audit context only; does not directly alter decision outputs.

objects.producer: Task-3 disposition spine (disposition_log.append_disposition); rails written by the operator through TODAY-DECIDE clipboard copies, persisted by the cloud routine wrapper.
objects.dashboard_surface: Per-card last-disposition line on TODAY-DECIDE; orphan-escalation strip; 30-day lookback panel.
objects.mirror_policy: Append-only JSON Lines in repo; UNDO is a new void row, never a deletion.
objects.freshness_contract: Each ACT/PASS/RECHECK/UNDO row stamps an ET date; daily orphan escalation checks the timestamps.
objects.not_checked_behavior: Absent file rendered as 'none logged yet'; load_open_cards treats every card as open.
objects.action_surface: Drives orphan escalation, PASS-reason audit, and the lookback %-since/%-vs-SPY tracker.

objects.producer: Pattern slot #11 (pattern_engine.load_prediction_signals) — populated by the parallel prediction-markets exploration when wired; absent by default.
objects.dashboard_surface: TODAY-DECIDE honesty footer: prediction_signals_status; future prediction-markets card lane (pattern slot #11).
objects.mirror_policy: GitHub stores the validated rows; the loader rejects malformed payloads rather than partial-accept.
objects.freshness_contract: Schema-checked at read; each row carries venue + topic + probability in [0,1].
objects.not_checked_behavior: Missing file renders honest 'not_checked' status; invalid payload renders 'invalid' status with the parse reason.
objects.action_surface: Currently advisory context only; reserved for a future card lane when an operator-approved prediction-markets source is wired.
